subcodes.first_line: Hearken unto the Call of the Most Glorious from this dark well: "Aid Me, O people of Bahá, with the sword of wisdom!" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان استمع ندآء الله الابهی من بئر ظلماء ان انصرونی یا اهل البهاء بسیف الحکمه
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
